title: Washi Tape Obsessed?
excerpt: If you've been following this blog for a while, you'll know I have a fondness for washi tape. It's an obsession and I cannot seem to find a cure. There are more and more companies producing the cutest patterns and…
body: If you've been following this blog for a while, you'll know I have a fondness for washi tape. It's an obsession and I cannot seem to find a cure. There are more and more companies producing the cutest patterns and I simply cannot resist. I have been asked numerous times about my collection, and thought it would be fun to film the organization process. Storing them in plastic containers from the Japanese store works best for me. Some of the containers are meant for pasta, and as for the others - I am not certain. What I am certain about though, is that this post is totally enabling and giving you permission to indulge in these colorful, fun tapes. You have been warned.
